draft:
Subject: Re: Request for Full-time Role in LUMIQ.AI

Dear [Contact's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. Thank you for reaching out to inquire about the Hermes Email Intelligence Pipeline for SmartTech's internal operations.

Regarding your questions about the pre-processor's handling of PII scrubbing, I would like to assure you that we prioritize data privacy and security. Our pre-processor redacts names and financial credentials locally before sending inputs to the LLM (OpenAI/Gemini), ensuring an added layer of protection.

In terms of the decision engine's handling of context-window truncation for long historical threads, we implement measures to prevent hallucination by carefully truncating the context window while maintaining contextual integrity.

Should you require further clarification or have any additional queries, please do not hesitate to reach out. We would be more than happy to provide you with any necessary information.

Thank you for considering LUMIQ.AI for your operations. We look forward to the possibility of working together.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
LUMIQ.AI Team
